intro: Hello! I am Milad, a Ph.D. Candidate and researcher in the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering at Worcester Polytechnic Institute (WPI).
middle: My research bridges the gap between advanced artificial intelligence and next-generation telecommunications. Specifically, my interests focus on:
bullets: 5G and 6G wireless infrastructure and O-RAN architecture.
Integrating Machine Learning (Continual & Reinforcement Learning) into physical-layer systems.
Building and managing high-performance GPU clusters and software-defined radio (SDR) environments.
conclusion: Prior to my academic career, I spent over seven years as a Data Scientist and Engineer in the telecommunications industry, working with global enterprise systems including the MTN Group. I am currently completing my Ph.D. under the supervision of Dr. Bo Tang.
